plan_name: CLI-15: Wire all read-only CLI subcommands through daemon when socket is available

tasks.name: Task 1: Integrate ConnectionMode into main dispatch and update sessions/search/query subcommands
tasks.notes: Refactored main() dispatch to detect ConnectionMode once at startup. Updated all 7 read-only handlers (search, sessions, query, stats, export, version-check, schema-drift) to accept ConnectionMode with Daemon/Direct match arms. All 7 co-committed because dispatch refactor requires all handlers to accept ConnectionMode for compilation. Removed dead open_db() helper.

tasks.name: Task 2: Update stats/export/version-check/schema-drift subcommands for daemon routing
tasks.notes: Added debug log to detect_connection_mode Direct DB path. Stats/export/version-check/schema-drift daemon routing was co-committed in Task 1 due to shared dispatch. This commit covers the remaining daemon_client.rs enhancement.

decisions: All 7 handlers updated in single commit due to shared dispatch refactor — compilation requires simultaneous conversion
Daemon communication failures produce explicit errors rather than silent fallback to direct DB
Stats daemon routing uses group_by=session when session_id present to match direct DB behavior
